purpose: List installed KC titles and the available-forms list per title (cross-title capable). Source for Single Audit (S-suffix) forms and a newer-title check.
auth: KC localStorage tokens (kc.accessToken Bearer + IdToken mixed-case), XHR from KC tab. Live 200 2026-06-04.

titles.returns: ALL installed titles (218 at capture). Fields: id (titleGuid), name, year, refTag, familyID, previousYearTitleId, isSingleAudit, kcVersionContent, shortName.
titles.use: newer-title check: group by familyID, compare binder title year vs max year.

forms_for_title.returns: available forms for that title on that binder: group, name (carries the form index e.g. 'AID-301S ...'), referenceTag, workpaperId/id, allowToAdd, isCoreWorkpaper.
forms_for_title.use: works CROSS-TITLE on one binder — a governmental binder can list+add Single Audits title forms.

single_audit_title.name: Knowledge-Based Single Audits
single_audit_title.note: 2024 is the NEWEST SA edition as of 2026-06-04. All S-suffix forms (84 forms incl. RES/RPT/KCO) live here, NOT in the governmental title.
single_audit_title.static_list: references/data/sa-title-forms.tsv (form index | referenceTag | full name | section prefix). Prefer a live GetWorkpaperListForAddForms pull; the TSV is the offline fallback.

ui_note: The Add Forms dialog opens as a SEPARATE KC tab: knowledgecoach.../binder/{binderGuid}/new-workpapers/{titleGuid}.
